{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/271222562?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/topsec-bunney/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/topsec-bunney/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/topsec-bunney/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/topsec-bunney/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/topsec-bunney", "id": 271222562, "login": "topsec-bunney", "node_id": "U_kgDOECqHIg", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/topsec-bunney/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/topsec-bunney/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/topsec-bunney/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/topsec-bunney/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/topsec-bunney/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/topsec-bunney", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-41339", "cvss": {"score": 4.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 4.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:L/UI:N/VC:L/VI:N/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-200", "name": "Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor"}], "description": "## Summary

Before OpenClaw 2026.4.2, the Gateway `connect` success snapshot exposed local `configPath` and `stateDir` metadata to non-admin clients. Low-privilege authenticated clients could learn host filesystem layout and deployment details that were not needed for their role.

## Impact

A non-admin client could recover host-specific filesystem paths and related deployment metadata, aiding host fingerprinting and chained attacks. This was an information-disclosure issue, not a direct authorization bypass.

## Affected Packages / Versions

- Package: `openclaw` (npm)
- Affected versions: `<= 2026.4.1`
- Patched versions: `>= 2026.4.2`
- Latest published npm version: `2026.4.1`

## Fix Commit(s)

- `676b748056b5efca6f1255708e9dd9469edf5e2e` — limit connect snapshot metadata to admin-scoped clients

## Release Process Note

The fix is present on `main` and is staged for OpenClaw `2026.4.2`. Publish this advisory after the `2026.4.2` npm release is live.

Thanks @topsec-bunney for reporting.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00283, "percentile": 0.19831}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-2f7j-rp58-mr42", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-07T18:15:44Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-2f7j-rp58-mr42", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-2f7j-rp58-mr42"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-41339"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-04-07T18:15:44Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-2f7j-rp58-mr42", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/676b748056b5efca6f1255708e9dd9469edf5e2e", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-41339", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/openclaw-information-disclosure-via-gateway-connect-snapshot", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-2f7j-rp58-mr42"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/security-advisories/GHSA-2f7j-rp58-mr42", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "OpenClaw: Gateway hello snapshots exposed host config and state paths to non-admin clients", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-06T23:24:51Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-2f7j-rp58-mr42", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.4.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 2026.4.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: OpenClaw: Gateway hello snapshots exposed host config and state paths to non-admin clients
